title: 日本ダービーの後に・追いついた！

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... gasp...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine... I'm fine. Were you watching?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine... I'm fine. Were you watching?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I... I caught up to Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Heh... I... did it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Zzz... zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her strength exhausted, she collapses before me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush forward to lend her my shoulder to rest on.
And as I do...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Her choice of words does not match the scenario
we are in.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Considering the outcome of the race, she should
have said she "beat" me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The phrase "caught up to" is misleading. Should
you not correct her?
choice_data_list:
Catching up to you is what was important to
her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: This... does not compute.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I didn't mean to cause you trouble!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but...
choice_data_list:
Don't worry about it. We have to focus on what
comes next.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Next?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Ah! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Ah! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I may have won this time... but I can't be satisfied
with just that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hm... The next race Bourbon will run in has got to
be...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Then I'll run in that too... Let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho is the final race in the Triple
Crown tour—a 3000-meter long-distance turf
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Rice Shower is a stayer, that means her
chances of victory are the highest they've ever
been!
